name: mcp-auth
description: Guides teams through adding OAuth 2.1 authorization to MCP servers with Scalekit.

interface.shortDescription: Add OAuth 2.1 protection to MCP servers.
interface.longDescription: Production-oriented guidance for securing MCP servers with Scalekit, including protected-resource metadata, token validation, and host testing.
defaultPrompt: Add Scalekit OAuth 2.1 auth to this MCP server.
Review this MCP auth flow for missing security steps.
Set up protected-resource metadata for my MCP server.
